title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.871 - Officer James Muhlbauer K-9 Officer Champ memorial bridge designated on a bridge on I-70 in Jackson County
text:
227.871.  Officer James Muhlbauer K-9 Officer Champ memorial bridge designated on a bridge on I-70 in Jackson County. — The bridge on Interstate 70 crossing over CST Van Brunt Boulevard in Jackson County shall be designated as "Officer James Muhlbauer K-9 Officer Champ Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by the department of transportation.
(L. 2025 S.B. 348)
